dailyNews.title: Texas Man Charged With Attempted Murder of Sam Altman
dailyNews.description: Local and federal prosecutors filed attempted murder and other criminal charges against the man arrested Friday for allegedly throwing a Molotov cocktail at the home of OpenAI Chief Executive Officer Sam Altman.

dailyNews.title: US enforces Hormuz blockade after Trump's threat; here's why and how it's being carried out
dailyNews.description: The US has begun enforcing a blockade on ships linked to Iranian ports after Donald Trump’s warning, deploying warships and aircraft to intercept vessels. The move targets Iran’s oil exports and maritime tolls, raising global energy concerns and adding pressure amid stalled negotiations.

dailyNews.title: World Economy Could Be "Thrown Off Course" By War In Middle East: IMF
dailyNews.description: The global economy is set to grow by 3.1 percent this year, said the International Monetary Fund in its World Economic Outlook report, released during its spring meetings in Washington.

dailyNews.title: Explained: Is China Slowly Entering Iran War As US Blockades Hormuz?
dailyNews.description: The failure of Islamabad peace talks and the new counter-blockades that the US has imposed in the Strait of Hormuz have widened the horizon of the West Asia war.

dailyNews.description: In their 40-minute call, which was their third phone conversation this year, US President Donald Trump briefed PM Narendra Modi about the situation in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Trump asks UK to 'drill, baby, drill’ in North Sea; pressure mounts on Starmer as Iran war pushes oil prices higher
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump on Tuesday asked UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer to 'drill, baby, drill’ in the North Sea as oil prices spike amid the Iran war. The development comes as Starmer faces mounting pressure from members of his cabinet and former PM Tony Blair.

dailyNews.description: The overnight stay at the White House signals the significance Washington places on its relationship with the Netherlands, even as tensions persist over Iran, NATO, and broader geopolitical challenges.

dailyNews.title: US, Iran to hold second round of peace talks in Pakistan? Trump says ‘over next two days...’
dailyNews.description: US, Iran to hold second round of peace talks in Pakistan? Trump says ‘over next two days...’

dailyNews.title: Trump blasts close ally Meloni, says she’s failing US on Iran
dailyNews.description: Trump publicly rebukes Italian PM Giorgia Meloni, accusing her of lacking courage on Iran, as Italy suspends its defense agreement with Israel.

dailyNews.title: Trump DOJ fires prosecutors tied to FACE Act cases after report alleges bias and misconduct
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration fired four DOJ prosecutors tied to FACE Act cases against pro-life activists, alleging the law was weaponized under Biden.

dailyNews.title: Trump swings for moon with nuclear reactor plans as China, Russia team up in space race
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration released a memo detailing plans for a nuclear reactor on the Moon by 2030 to advance U.S. space exploration and defense.

dailyNews.title: 51 Percent of Americans Think Trump’s Military Action in Iran Has Not Been Worthwhile
dailyNews.description: A survey from Ipsos and Reuters, released on Tuesday, found few Americans — 24 percent — think the war in Iran has been worth the costs and benefits.

dailyNews.title: Kevin Warsh, Trump’s Pick for Fed Chair, Discloses Vast Wealth Ahead of Confirmation Hearing
dailyNews.description: Kevin M. Warsh vowed to divest a substantial amount of his more than $100 million in assets as he faces a complicated path to becoming the next chair of the Federal Reserve.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Accuses Biden DOJ of Unfairly Prosecuting Anti-Abortion Activists
dailyNews.description: The report is part of the president’s effort to claim anti-conservative and anti-Christian biases in federal law enforcement, even as he pushes to wield the legal system against his political enemies.

dailyNews.title: US Blockade of Strait of Hormuz Begins Amid New Push for Talks
dailyNews.description: The United States military’s partial blockade of the Strait of Hormuz imposed by President Donald Trump is now in effect, preventing Iran from exporting oil. Pakistan has proposed hosting a second round of talks in Islamabad before the two-week ceasefire expires. NBC’s Richard Engel reports for TODAY.

dailyNews.title: Blanche praises Trump’s involvement in Justice Department
dailyNews.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche tells NBC News’ Laura Jarrett that Americans should be “happy” with President Trump’s involvement in the Department of Justice, and acknowledges that there are certain investigations which are an “outsized focus” right now for the department.

dailyNews.title: Trump Faces Bipartisan Backlash Over Feud With Pope Leo
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump is insisting he will not apologize to Pope Leo XIV after lashing out at the head of the Catholic Church for criticizing the Iran war. The president also offered a new explanation for the now-deleted and controversial AI image appearing to depict himself as Jesus that received swift bi-partisan backlash. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY.
